title: 6 Pack Catnip Mouse Toys for Indoor Cats & Kittens - Assorted Color Design, Non-Toxic, Safe & Fun Catnip Toys
features: 1. 6 Colors Cat Toys Mouse: This magical mouse, loved by cats worldwide, features a mouse shape and assorted color design to attract your cat's interest, relieving their mood, eliminating boredom, and providing endless fun.
2. Premium Material Catnip Toys for Cats: Made with non-toxic materials, Plush + cotton, these catnip mice ensure the health of your pet, offering a safe environment and toy for exercise and play.
3. Safe Cat Mice Toys: The eyes are made of cloth material, ensuring they don't fall off and making them safer. Your cat is not in danger of swallowing by mistake.
4. More Fun Cat Toy Interactive: These cat nip toys provide hours of fun and exercise, serving as a healthy outlet for your cat's natural hunting instincts.
5. Cat Nip Toys: Infused with the scent of catnip, this mouse will make your cat go crazy. If the scent fades, you can sprinkle some catnip powder to re-stimulate your cat’s interest.
